errors.credits_must_be_positive: Credits to use must be greater than 0.
errors.invalid_order_total: Order total must be greater than 0.
errors.credits_decimal_precision: Credits must have at most 2 decimal places.
errors.credits_exceed_max: Credits to use exceed the per-redemption maximum.
errors.self_redemption_forbidden: You cannot redeem credits at your own listing.
errors.programme_unavailable: The loyalty programme is not available on this community.
errors.merchant_disabled: This merchant is no longer accepting time credits.
errors.merchant_misconfigured: This merchant's loyalty configuration is invalid.
errors.exceeds_max_discount: Discount exceeds the maximum allowed for this order.
errors.zero_balance: You have no time credits to redeem.
errors.insufficient_credits: Not enough time credits in your wallet.
errors.redemption_not_reversible: Only applied redemptions can be reversed.
errors.reversal_reason_too_long: Reversal reason must be 500 characters or fewer.
errors.invalid_listing: Ní leis an díoltóir seo an liostú.
errors.listing_unavailable: Níl an liostú seo ar fáil le haghaidh fuascailte dílseachta.
errors.invalid_exchange_rate: CHF per hour must be between 0 and 9999.
errors.invalid_max_discount_pct: Max discount percent must be between 0 and 100.

errors.already_responded: D'fhreagair tú an suirbhé seo cheana.
errors.not_accepting: Níl an suirbhé seo ag glacadh le freagraí faoi láthair.
errors.required_question: Níl freagra ar an gceist riachtanach #:id.

sub_region_demand.title: Sub-region coverage
sub_region_demand.description: Hours requested vs. fulfilled per sub-region. Coverage below 50% is flagged.

helper_churn.title: Helper churn
helper_churn.description: Share of previously active helpers who haven't logged hours in the last 30 days.

coefficient_drift.title: Category coefficient drift
coefficient_drift.description: Observed average hours per session compared to the admin-set baseline. Drift above 15% is flagged.

helper_at_risk.message: We've missed you lately — would you like a warmth pass with a fellow helper?

unfulfilled_help_request.message: T? iarratas cabhrach :name ag fanacht le breis agus :days l?. An bhf?adfaimis an cuardach a leathn??

low_coverage_subregion.message: T? ganntanas taca?ochta ag :name faoi l?thair. Smaoinigh ar n?os m? c?nt?ir? a earc? ansin.

alerts.recipients_without_tandem_message: Fuair ​​na baill seo cabhair le sé mhí anuas ach níl aon chomhcheangal gníomhach athfhillteach acu. Péireáil le tacadóir seasta iad chun leanúnachas a ghlasáil.
alerts.inactive_members_message: Baill a logáil uaireanta le sé mhí anuas ach gan aon rud le 30 lá anuas. Is minic a tharraingíonn seiceáil isteach cairdiúil arís iad.
alerts.overdue_reviews_title: Léirmheasanna uair an chloig caite SLA
alerts.overdue_reviews_message: Ar feitheamh logs toirte níos sine ná laethanta :sla. Faomh nó formhéadaigh iad ionas go bhfaighidh na baill creidiúint.
alerts.coordinators_overloaded_message: Tá níos mó ná 10 n-athbhreithniú ar feitheamh sannta ag comhordaitheoir amháin nó níos mó. Athshannadh sula dtagann scrogaill.
alerts.overdue_check_ins_message: Caidrimh ghníomhacha athfhillteacha a bhfuil a sheiceáil-isteach sceidealta caite. Déan teagmháil lena dheimhniú go bhfuil an dá thaobh fós go maith.
alerts.low_supply_title: Catagóirí a bhfuil éileamh neamhchomhlíonta acu
alerts.low_supply_message: Catagóirí a bhfuil níos mó iarrataí gníomhacha iontu ná na tairiscintí atá ar fáil. Is fiú aird a tharraingt ar lucht tacaíochta féideartha.

civic_digest.cadence_invalid: ní mór an deireadh a bheith mar cheann de: off, daily, monthly

civic_digest.opt_out_sources_invalid: Caithfidh opt_out_sources a bheith ina sraith eochracha foinse

readiness.notes_invalid: Ní mór do nótaí a bheith ina sreang
readiness.notes_too_long: Caithfidh 2000 carachtar nó níos lú a bheith sna nótaí
readiness.value_string: Ní mór luach a bheith ina sreang

validation.owner_email_invalid: Caithfidh ríomhphost an úinéara a bheith ina sheoladh ríomhphoist bailí.

data_quality.missing_language_positive: Gheobhaidh na comhaltaí seo ríomhphoist agus fógraí i réamhshocrú an ardáin. Socraigh a rogha teanga le haghaidh logánú ceart.
data_quality.missing_language_ok: Tá rogha teanga ag gach ball.
data_quality.no_sub_region_column: Níl aon cholún users.sub_region_id ar an scéimre seo. Déantar nasc fo-réigiún a rianú in áiteanna eile.
data_quality.no_sub_regions: Níl aon fho-réigiúin sainithe don tionónta seo. Seiceáil gan bacadh le.
data_quality.no_coordinator_column: Níl aon cholún comhordaitheora ar an scéimre seo.
